overview: MedTech Management specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, peptides, medical weight loss treatments, and vitamin and amino acid injections. The practice manages patient care operations including scheduling, billing, treatment coordination, and clinical support through a team of physician liaisons.
highlights: Offers peptide therapies including Thymosin, BPC-157, and GHK-CU
Provides vitamin and amino acid injections
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone replacement therapy, peptide treatments, and anti-aging care.
